violations.text: -Handwashing sink in the dishwashing room was observed in poor repair (leaking from discharge pipe when in use). -Pipe under dishmachine observed leaking Systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

-Wall under 3 bay produce sink was observed in poor repair. -Floor tiles near combi oven and drain were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2025

The ceiling in the produce walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair (observed in poor repair and panel junctures). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, large mixer cage and knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items (oven) was observed in the Kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023

Violation of Code: [6-101.11] The walls in the dish room are constructed of painted cinderblock, this material is not easily cleanable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Wall and floor junctions under and behind dish machine in dish room and under and behind 3 bay sink in kitchen were observed in poor repair, drywall and other unidentifiable material was exposed. Wall and floor junctions behind high moisture area was not properly coved. Various areas throughout the kitchens and dish room were observed with grout that was deteriorating. Those areas must be regrouted. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024 Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
